introSection: Cétautomatix is a steel spinning roller coaster at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On 13 August 2025 the park announced that the ride would open on 18 August. The ride soft opened to park guests on 13 August or earlier.

The ride opened to the public on 18 August 2025.

fullText:
Cétautomatix is a steel spinning roller coaster at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France.

On 13 August 2025 the park announced that the ride would open on 18 August. The ride soft opened to park guests on 13 August or earlier.

The ride opened to the public on 18 August 2025.
